report.message: cvc-complex-type.2.4.a: Invalid content was found starting with element 'cei:placeName'. One of '{"http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":lem}' is expected.

cvc-complex-type.2.4.a: Invalid content was found starting with element 'cei:lem'. One of '{"http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":index, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":foreign, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":note, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":placeName, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":persName, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":name, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":orgName, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":witStart, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":witEnd, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":witDetail, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":lacunaStart, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":lacunaEnd, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":expan, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":add, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":supplied, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":del, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":corr, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":space, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":damage, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":c, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":sic, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":handShift, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":unclear, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":w, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":pc, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":hi, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":pb, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":lb, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":sup, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":pict, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":app}' is expected.
cvc-complex-type.2.4.a: Invalid content was found starting with element 'cei:add'. One of '{"http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":lem}' is expected.

cvc-complex-type.2.4.a: Invalid content was found starting with element 'cei:lem'. One of '{"http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":expan, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":c, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":lb, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":pb, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":sic, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":corr, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":del, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":damage, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":handShift, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":w, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":persName, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":rolename, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":orgName, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":placeName, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":geogName, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":index, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":testis, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":date, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":dateRange, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":num, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":measure, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":anchor, "http://www.monasterium.net/NS/cei":ref}' is expected.
